title: Better Totems
description: Allows totems of undying to save players from the void, and when anywhere in the inventory.
body:
Adds two new gamerules:

| **Name** | **Default** | **Description** |
|-|-|-|
| `totemsInVoid` | `true` | Allows totems to save players from the void. They will receive levitation and slow falling. |
| `totemsInInventory` | `true` | Allows totems to save players, even if they aren't holding it. It can be anywhere in their inventory. |
